note: Explorer address dashboard fix-up: the 4 DTD LOTTERY branches (lottUnspentCount>0 current-unspent, lottLifetimeCount>0 lifetime, lottUnspentCount===0 no-lottery-and-no-scan, else DTD-not-run-yet) had been left on the old plain title-attribute pattern by an earlier script that aborted before writing them. They now use the same _addrBalRow helper as every other balance row, so all 10 metric rows (TOTAL BALANCE, MINED, RECEIVED currently held, GROSS received lifetime, GROSS sent lifetime, NET external outflow, DTD LOTTERY current, DTD LOTTERY lifetime, SPENDABLE, IMMATURE) expose a clickable label with chevron and the same dropdown body styling. Descriptions audited and confirmed: TOTAL = sum invariant, MINED = type=1 coinbase miner-share unspent, RECEIVED currently held = snapshot non-coinbase UTXOs, GROSS received lifetime = getaddressflows received_non_mining never-decreases-includes-self-send-change, GROSS sent lifetime = inputs-consumed gross including self-send round-trips, NET external = not computed in v0 with rationale, DTD LOTTERY current = type=4 unspent excluded-from-MINED with maturity rule, DTD LOTTERY lifetime = includes-spent-from-localStorage-cache, SPENDABLE = mature subset of TOTAL with maturity rule, IMMATURE = coinbase miner + lottery waiting on COINBASE_MATURITY confirmations. HTML balance preserved (section 1/1, div 795/795). NO consensus / RPC / node / miner / wallet / wire-format change.
